violations.text: A strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Various foods was observed held at 50-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, foods were put in unit less than 2 hours prior. Foods were relocated to reach in refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Salami which was prepared on site, date marked 12/30 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days shall be discarded. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Cold drawer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 48F. PIC informed to not store TCS foods in unit until serviced and reaches an ambient of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice used for drinks. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
Establishment is lacking a 3-compartment sink. Establishment must install a 3-compartment sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025

The ice machine and prep sink are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
